name: Sky-High Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Corn, whole kernel; cooked, cold
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients.
2. Stir curry powder and chutney into French dressing.
3. Pour over the salad mixture.
4. Toss lightly to combine.
5. Chill until serving time.
6. Mound on top of crisp salad greens.
7. Garnish with slices of hard-cooked eggs.
